_howto: ADD AN APP (manual, by design — there is no admin page):
1. Add an entry to "apps" below (copy the template object).
3. Run Prompts 3-5 for the app's legal (privacy + terms) and detail pages.
4. Add the new URLs to sitemap.xml.
5. git push.  (The 'save' action on GitHub Pages is a git commit.)
NOTE: privacy + terms pages are ALWAYS static HTML — never rendered from this file.

apps.name: Sprout
apps.tagline: Scan any plant, get its whole story.
apps.description: Point your camera at a plant for a beautiful care card + gentle watering reminders. No account.

features.title: Instant ID
features.text: Snap a plant and get its name + full care card in seconds.

features.title: Gentle reminders
features.text: Calm, per-plant watering nudges — supportive, never naggy.

features.title: Beautiful cards
features.text: Editorial care cards you'll actually want to screenshot and share.

apps.name: Approved
apps.tagline: Passport photos that pass — before you pay.
apps.description: Snap a selfie, get a perfectly sized passport or visa photo. Every rule checked, on your device.

features.title: The Compliance Coach
features.text: Every rule shown as a green tick or amber flag, with a plain-language reason and a fix.

features.title: Your photo stays yours
features.text: Processed on-device, checked once by AI, never used for training, no account, no tracking.

features.title: File + print sheet
features.text: Exact-spec digital photo plus a 4×6 and A4 sheet with cut lines for any photo shop.

apps.name: Unpile
apps.description: Turns the mess you've been avoiding into tiny timed steps you can actually start — with a before/after to prove you did.

features.title: Snap the pile
features.text: Photograph the mess; AI turns it into tiny, doable missions.

features.title: Start, don't stress
features.text: A timer and a companion keep you going — XP for starting, never shame for stopping.

features.title: See the proof
features.text: A before/after card celebrates what you did and is yours to share.

apps.name: Receipt Keeper
apps.description: Snap any receipt and AI files it for you — searchable, with warranty alerts before they expire.

features.title: Snap and forget
features.text: Photograph a receipt; AI reads the merchant, amount and date for you.

features.title: Warranty alerts
features.text: Get reminded before a warranty runs out — with the receipt ready to go.

features.title: Find it instantly
features.text: Search every receipt by store, amount or note in seconds.

apps.name: Paperly
apps.tagline: PDF & image tools that never leave your phone
apps.description: Merge, compress, convert, and lock PDFs & images — 100% on your device. No account, no ads, nothing ever uploaded.

features.title: Private by design
features.text: Every file is processed on your device and never uploaded.

features.title: All-in-one toolkit
features.text: Merge, compress, photos→PDF, and HEIC/JPG/PNG convert.

features.title: No ads, no accounts
features.text: No sign-up, no tracking, no ads — pay once or not at all.
